series_metadata.series_description: Provides evidence of deposits of currency and negotiable instruments with the State Treasurer. The file contains a receipted copy of the ADM-3149 showing sources of receipts, appropriation codes, revenues, refunds, and total amount of deposit to the State Treasurer.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 5 years after audit, and after audit report is released, then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper
